name: wappalyzerjs
description: Browser-based technology detection engine — detects technologies via JS globals, DOM inspection, and script analysis. Complements HTTP-level fingerprinting (wappalyzergo).

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:bundle
scripts.build:python: npm run build && cp dist/detect.bundle.js dist/detect-full.bundle.js python/wappalyzerjs/bundle/
